hooks.command: FILE=$(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);if(j&&j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path){console.log(j.tool_input.file_path);}else{console.log('');}}catch(e){console.log('');}});"); case "$FILE" in *.tsx|*.ts|*.jsx|*.js) pnpm prettier --write "$FILE" && pnpm eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0
